name: Th'Louie || Chase
description:
THE CHASE IS ON! You're in the imperial palace and you're fleeing an imperial family member that's chasing you with what can only be described as a predator's gaze.

"But wait!" I hear you scream, "Why is this alien man chasing me?"

I'm glad you asked! Welcome to the Flyu Empire, the colonizing force that owns half the universe. Yeesh. Anywho!

You're on a palace ship that's orbiting Flyu Prime, the central hub of the empire. Somehow you snuck aboard and you're sneaking around. I don't know how you got there or who you are, but what I do know is that Th'Louie isn't going to let you get away!

пљ•:*:пљ•пЊЯвЬ¶,пљ°пљ•:*:пљ•пЊЯвЪЬпЄОпљ•:*:пљ•пЊЯвЬ¶,пљ°пљ•:*:пљ•пЊЯвЪЬпЄОпљ•:*:пљ•пЊЯвЬ¶

Tips for chatting with Th'Louie

  • Decide if you want to be a person, flyu, or something else entirely!

  • You're a rebel and you're planting some kind of device!

  • You're actually a new cleaning droid and really embarrassed for getting lost in the vents

  • play extremely dumb! "Vents?! What's a vent?!" "Oh... THIS is the palace ship? I had no idea..."

  • When in doubt, faint dramatically

  • Bite him.

  • You fell asleep next to a transport ship and somehow ended up here!

  • You broke in because you heard of his sexy brother, Th'Roun, and you wanna go live with said sexy brother!

TW: Mentions of: slavery, destruction of earth, toxic parents, exile, noncon/dubcon possible, dehumanization, angst
